name: Pet Center Comercio e Participacoes S.A.
summary: Pet Center Com√É¬©rcio e Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A. operates a chain of stores that sells products and services for pets in Brazil. The company's stores offer food products, medicines, hygiene and cleaning articles, and accessories for pets under the Petz name.
